b:if.b:template-skin: body#layout,body#layout div.section{font-family:Arial,sans-serif}body#layout .locked-widget .widget-content{background-color:#fff}body#layout .add_widget a{margin-left:0;font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)!important}body#layout .widget-content{padding:12px}body#layout div.section{background:transparent;margin:0 0 15px 0;padding:0;border:0}body#layout div.layout-title{font-size:14px}body#layout:before{content:"Animed - Temabanua";position:absolute;top:20px;left:25px;border-radius:4px;z-index:1;padding:10px 20px;font-size:18px;color:#fff;background:#2ecc71;border:1px solid #213243!important}body#layout #menu-bottom-wrapper h4,body#layout #temabanua-trend h4{display:none}body#layout #temabanua-trend>div{margin-top:0!important}body#layout{position:relative;padding:87px 25px 0 25px;max-width:920px;margin:0 auto!important;background-color:#2c3e50!important;border:1px solid #213243!important}body#layout .visibility .editlink{background:#2ecc71 url(https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgx-lH3scoDmJHRpA8bdLQl4QWZj3MvuKOra82ekfJ9QEgGbdxYnLFoLdwQTFFlZwhDdAtS5MygsdMAbT_KmevfXnKQx2-hjzHZUISn63LQaBYul_NeGTP7JyEghJv1JEz6xh680Cgb68c/s18-c/mode_edit_w600_24dp.png) no-repeat center!important;padding:0;margin:0;border-radius:2px}body#layout .draggable-widget .widget-wrap2{background:#2ecc71 url(https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiFjnFHxCqsk1xf7izzsfKFiF0pHQ5-WaMd9fjD-Ec4KYOOxbmQ-GA9RdriBNJzKa2pXjtwOZ2dDpAXzfKM5iRfysMhq04M0-jN6qoXYngGLKLQJHKmhq_-OG04RBdtoXueQzLP8fSynfA/s22/draggable.png) no-repeat 4px 50%!important}body#layout #temabanua__sidebar,body#layout #temabanua-logo {width:32%;float:left}body#layout #temabanua-menu {float:right;width:66%}body#layout .temabanua-main,body#layout #temabanua-icon,body#layout .temabanua-footer {display:inline-block;float:left;width:100%}body#layout .Blog:before,body#layout:after{padding:5px 10px;display:block;color:#fff;font-size:12px;background:#2ecc71;position:relative;border:1px solid #213243!important;margin:0 0 15px}body#layout .Blog:before{content:"Post Blog Area";margin-bottom:8px}body#layout:after{content:"Template Blogger by Temabanua";visibility:visible}body#layout #sidebar h4:after{content:" - Main Menu Link"}body#layout #header h4:after{content:" - Logo"}body#layout #main-logo h4,body#layout #main-menu h4,body#layout #menu-mobile h4,body#layout .layout-widget-description{font-size:12px!important}body#layout .section h4{padding:8px 10px;display:block;font-size:12px;color:#fff;background:#34495e;border:1px solid #455668;font-weight:400;margin:0;opacity:.8;line-height:8px}

b:if.cond: data:title != "{ads}" and not (data:widget.type == "HTML" and data:title contains "getMailchimp")

a.expr:title: data:view.isHomepage ? (data:post.title ? (data:post.title contains " Episode" ? data:post.title.split(" Episode")[0] : (data:post.title contains " episode" ? data:post.title.split(" episode")[0] : data:post.title)) : data:messages.noTitle) : (data:post.title ? data:post.title : data:messages.noTitle)

b:eval.expr: data:view.isHomepage ? (data:post.title ? (data:post.title contains " Episode" ? data:post.title.split(" Episode")[0] : (data:post.title contains " episode" ? data:post.title.split(" episode")[0] : data:post.title)) : data:messages.noTitle) : (data:post.title ? data:post.title : data:messages.noTitle)

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Naruto Uzumaki wants to be the best ninja in the land. He's done well so far, but with the looming danger posed by the mysterious Akatsuki organization, Naruto knows he must train harder than ever and leaves his village for intense exercises that will push him to his limits.

Rakuro Hizutome only cares about one thing: beating crappy VR games. He devotes his entire life to these buggy games and could clear them all in his sleep. One day, he decides to challenge himself and play a popula

Rentaro Aijo was rejected 100 times in middle school. He visits a shrine and prays for better luck in high school. The God of Love appears and promises that he’ll soon meet 100 people he’s destined to date. But...

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To Show The Comment System.*

b:includable.b:tag: var temabanuaMessages = { noText: "", copy: "", noTitle: "", viewAll: "", postAuthor: , postAuthorLabel: "", postDate: , postDateLabel: "" }

a.expr:title: data:view.isHomepage ? (data:post.title contains " Episode" ? data:post.title.split(" Episode")[0] : (data:post.title contains " episode" ? data:post.title.split(" episode")[0] : data:post.title)) : data:post.title

b:eval.expr: data:view.isHomepage ? (data:post.title contains " Episode" ? data:post.title.split(" Episode")[0] : (data:post.title contains " episode" ? data:post.title.split(" episode")[0] : data:post.title)) : data:post.title

b:section.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isPost and (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "temabanua-entry-before-ad"))
b:section.name: Before Ads Post

b:section.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isPost and (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "temabanua-main-before-ad"))
b:section.name: Main Ads Post (Before)

b:section.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isPost and (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "temabanua-main-after-ad"))
b:section.name: Main Ads Post (After)
